name: cuda-clarity-helper
description: Repo-local helper for improving CUDA file readability, comments, and top-of-file algorithm summaries in cuda-algorithm-lab.

interface.shortDescription: Improve comments, readability, and top-of-file algorithm explanations
interface.longDescription: Helps rewrite CUDA files so they are easier to read, adds intent-focused comments where needed, and ensures each file starts with a clear explanation of the file's purpose and the high-level algorithm.
defaultPrompt: Use $cuda-clarity-helper to make this CUDA file easier to read.
Use $cuda-clarity-helper to add a top-of-file intent and high-level algorithm summary.
Use $cuda-clarity-helper to improve comments without adding noise.
